---
format: html
title: make_community_proportions()
---

<html><head>
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=yes" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.css">
<script type="text/javascript">
const macros = { "\\R": "\\textsf{R}", "\\mbox": "\\text", "\\code": "\\texttt"};
function processMathHTML() {
    var l = document.getElementsByClassName('reqn');
    for (let e of l) { katex.render(e.textContent, e, { throwOnError: false, macros }); }
    return;
}</script>
<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.js"
    onload="processMathHTML();"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="R.css" />
</head><body><div class="container"><main>

<table style="width: 100%;"><tr><td>make_community_proportions</td><td style="text-align: right;">R Documentation</td></tr></table>

<h2>Make Community Proportions</h2>

<h3>Description</h3>

<p>Transforms community pollen count data into proportions, normalising
each sample by its total pollen count.
</p>


<h3>Usage</h3>

<pre><code class='language-R'>make_community_proportions(data = NULL)
</code></pre>


<h3>Arguments</h3>

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td><code id="data">data</code></td>
<td>
<p>A data frame with columns 'dataset_name', 'sample_name', 'taxon',
'age', and 'pollen_count'. Must contain a 'pollen_count' column with
raw pollen counts.</p>
</td></tr>
</table>


<h3>Details</h3>

<p>Computes per-sample totals using 'get_pollen_sum()' and normalises
counts via 'transform_to_proportions()'. The result is suitable for
passing to 'interpolate_community_data()'.
</p>


<h3>Value</h3>

<p>A data frame with the same structure as the input, but with
'pollen_count' replaced by 'pollen_prop' (pollen counts divided by
sample-level total). The 'pollen_count' and 'pollen_sum' columns are
dropped.
</p>


<h3>See Also</h3>

<p>[interpolate_community_data()], [transform_to_proportions()]
</p>

</main>

</div>
</body></html>
